## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss CVE database development, content strategy, and LLM citation tracking for SentinelOne.](https://fathom.video/share/sZSWeshRAxVuQqQsJashJyxBuCzFm4_s?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [CVE database template reviewed; EPSS scores to be added, SentinelOne-specific sections removed for initial phase](https://fathom.video/share/sZSWeshRAxVuQqQsJashJyxBuCzFm4_s?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Content strategy for AI cybersecurity approved; calibration articles to be sent for review](https://fathom.video/share/sZSWeshRAxVuQqQsJashJyxBuCzFm4_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
  - [Scrunch dashboard introduced for tracking LLM citations; prompts to be reviewed by SentinelOne team](https://fathom.video/share/sZSWeshRAxVuQqQsJashJyxBuCzFm4_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)

## Topics

### CVE Database Development

  - [EPSS (Exploit Prediction Scoring System) scores to be added to vulnerability details](https://fathom.video/share/sZSWeshRAxVuQqQsJashJyxBuCzFm4_s?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [SentinelOne-specific sections (capabilities, how it helps) removed from initial phase due to potential inaccuracies](https://fathom.video/share/sZSWeshRAxVuQqQsJashJyxBuCzFm4_s?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [Tags for searchability (vendor, vulnerability type, platform) approved](https://fathom.video/share/sZSWeshRAxVuQqQsJashJyxBuCzFm4_s?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [External references to be kept with no-index links](https://fathom.video/share/sZSWeshRAxVuQqQsJashJyxBuCzFm4_s?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
  - [Figma template to be created for design review and leadership presentation](https://fathom.video/share/sZSWeshRAxVuQqQsJashJyxBuCzFm4_s?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)

### AI Cybersecurity Content Strategy

  - [Three content lanes identified: behavioral AI/autonomous security, AI threat landscape, foundational AI cybersecurity knowledge](https://fathom.video/share/sZSWeshRAxVuQqQsJashJyxBuCzFm4_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [Content ideas added to Content OS for SentinelOne team approval](https://fathom.video/share/sZSWeshRAxVuQqQsJashJyxBuCzFm4_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [Initial articles to be shared via Google Docs for collaboration before establishing CMS workflow](https://fathom.video/share/sZSWeshRAxVuQqQsJashJyxBuCzFm4_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
  - [ContentStack (not Contentful) implementation timeline to be clarified next week](https://fathom.video/share/sZSWeshRAxVuQqQsJashJyxBuCzFm4_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)

### LLM Citation Tracking (Scrunch)

  - [SentinelOne showing good presence across tracked LLMs (Perplexity, ChatGPT, Grok)](https://fathom.video/share/sZSWeshRAxVuQqQsJashJyxBuCzFm4_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
  - [Key competitors in LLM citations: CrowdStrike and Palo Alto Networks](https://fathom.video/share/sZSWeshRAxVuQqQsJashJyxBuCzFm4_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1491.0)
  - [Listicles and foundational knowledge pieces getting high citations](https://fathom.video/share/sZSWeshRAxVuQqQsJashJyxBuCzFm4_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
  - [Scrunch prompts to be reviewed and potentially expanded by SentinelOne team](https://fathom.video/share/sZSWeshRAxVuQqQsJashJyxBuCzFm4_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)
